case_title: OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS vs. FLAMER, LORRIANE

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT FLAMER, LORRIANE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-21-1993

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $94.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS AS TO DEFENDANT FLAMER, LORRIANE
DECLARATION OF RANDY OSBORNE RE; ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS SERVED OCT-05-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLAMER, LORRIANE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1993, CONTINUED TO MAY-24-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CASE TERMINATED: 21-APR-93 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSBORNE FUNERAL DIRECTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLAMER, LORRIANE $1,782.37 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $481.23 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,807.60
